sentences.arabic: كَانَ "الْحَكَوَاتِيُّ" يُمَثِّلُ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي الْمَقَاهِي الشَّعْبِيَّةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ، حَيْثُ يَجْتَمِعُ النَّاسُ حَوْلَهُ بِشَوْقٍ.
sentences.translation: Pripovjedač (Al-Hakawati) predstavljao je osnovni stub u starim narodnim kafanama, gdje bi se ljudi željno okupljali oko njega.
sentences.translationEn: The 'Hakawati' (storyteller) represented a fundamental pillar in the old popular cafes, where people gathered around him eagerly.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَسْرِدُ قِصَصَ الْأَبْطَالِ وَالْأَسَاطِيرِ بِأُسْلُوبٍ مَشُوقٍ يَجْذِبُ الْقُلُوبَ وَالْعُقُولَ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: On je pripovijedao priče o herojima i legendama na uzbudljiv način koji je privlačio i srca i umove.
sentences.translationEn: He would narrate stories of heroes and legends in a suspenseful style that attracted both hearts and minds.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ هَدَفُهُ التَّسْلِيَةَ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَعْزِيزَ الْقِيَمِ الْأَخْلَاقِيَّةِ وَالِانْتِمَاء لِلثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Njegov cilj nije bio samo zabava, već jačanje moralnih vrijednosti i pripadnosti arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: His goal was not only entertainment, but also reinforcing moral values and belonging to Arabic culture.

sentences.arabic: تَمَيَّزَ الْحَكَوَاتِيُّ بِقُدْرَتِهِ عَلَى تَلْوِينِ صَوْتِهِ وَتَقْمِيصِ الشَّخْصِيَّاتِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ بِبَرَاعَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pripovjedač se odlikovao sposobnošću da mijenja boju glasa i vrhunski oživljava različite likove.
sentences.translationEn: The storyteller was distinguished by his ability to color his voice and masterfully embody different characters.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تِلْكَ الْجَلَسَاتُ بِمَثَابَةِ مَدْرَسَةٍ شَفَهِيَّةٍ لِتَعْلِيمِ اللُّغَةِ وَالْأَدَبِ لِلْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ta sijela su bila poput usmene škole za podučavanje jezika i književnosti običnom narodu.
sentences.translationEn: Those sessions were like an oral school for teaching language and literature to the general public.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ انْدِثَارِ هَذِهِ الْمِهْنَةِ فِي يَوْمِنَا هَذَا، إِلَّا أَنَّ أَثَرَهَا لَا يَزَالُ بَاقِيًا فِي الْوِجْدَانِ الشَّعْبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Iako je ovaj zanat danas izumro, njegov trag i dalje ostaje u narodnoj svijesti.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the disappearance of this profession today, its impact remains in the popular conscience.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ إِحْيَاءَ هَذَا التُّرَاثِ يُسَاهِمُ فِي رَبْطِ الْحَاضِرِ بِمَاضٍ مَلِيءٍ بِالْإِبْدَاعِ وَالْجَمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Oživljavanje ovog naslijeđa doprinosi povezivanju sadašnjosti s prošlošću punom kreativnosti i ljepote.
sentences.translationEn: Reviving this heritage contributes to connecting the present with a past full of creativity and beauty.
